title: Ammocharis nerinoides
taxonomy: Ammocharis nerinoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It is native to tropical and southern Africa. The plant is known for its showy white flowers and strap-shaped leaves. Ammocharis nerinoides is commonly found in grasslands and open woodlands. Its classification places it within the kingdom Plantae and the order Asparagales.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antitumor properties, which may aid in relieving pain, reducing inflammation, and inhibiting the growth of cancer cells.
